case_title: HELEN LEE VS. ERIN PEAKE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEAKE, ERIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 522 ELLINGTON AVE. S.F. CA. 94112 $1,242.00 RENT, $274.00 COSTS, $765.90 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,281.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LEE, HELEN
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT PEAKE, ERIN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT PEAKE, ERIN DOES 1-10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS - DEFAULT ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PEAKE, ERIN
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT BY COURT, CCP 585D FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HELEN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE 20.70 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HELEN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PEAKE, ERIN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HELEN SERVED MAR-26-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEAKE, ERIN
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PEAKE, ERIN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEAKE, ERIN
